title: 2025.6.02Extending Docusign with Stripe to automate complex billing workflowsSummary:Discover how to streamline your agreement process by connecting DocuSign with Stripe using extension apps. Learn to build automated billing workflows without complex coding.Author:Paige RossiTopic:PartnersRead
author: Paige Rossi
full_text:
Paige Rossi

Paige has been working for Docusign since 2020. As Lead Developer Advocate on the Developer Advocacy team, she writes content and code to help developers learn how to use Docusign technology, represents Docusign at community events, and supports Docusign developers on community forums.
